title: Hoot Jumbo Rectangle Paddling Pool, 2m x 1.5m x 45cm, Heavy Gauge PVC, Easy Inflate
features: DIMENSIONS: Spacious family-sized paddling pool measuring 2m x 1.5m x 45cm, perfect for multiple children or adults to enjoy simultaneously
CONSTRUCTION: Heavy gauge PVC material ensures excellent durability and structural stability for long-lasting summer fun
EASY SETUP: Quick and simple inflation process allows for hassle-free assembly, getting you from box to splashing in no time
DESIGN: Rectangular shape provides optimal swimming and playing space, with raised sides for improved water retention
SUMMER ESSENTIAL: Perfect outdoor water feature for garden entertainment and cooling off during hot summer days
description: Transform your garden into a refreshing summer paradise with this spacious Hoot Jumbo Rectangle Paddling Pool. Boasting generous dimensions of 2 metres in length, 1.5 metres in width, and 45 centimetres in height, this pool provides plenty of room for family splashing and cooling off on hot summer days. Constructed with heavy gauge PVC material, this paddling pool delivers reliable durability for season after season of enjoyment. The straightforward inflation process means you can set up your backyard oasis quickly and easily, maximising your fun in the sun. The rectangular design offers efficient use of space, while the robust white and blue construction adds a touch of style to your outdoor area. Perfect for children's water play or adults looking to cool off, this paddling pool is an essential addition to your summer leisure collection. Make the most of sunny days with this versatile pool that brings the joy of swimming right to your doorstep.
